import{useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const EVENT_BOOKING_API="https://calebtonny.alwaysdata.net/api/event-booking";const EventBooking=()=>{const[name,setName]=useState("");const[email,setEmail]=useState("");const[phone,setPhone]=useState("");const[event_date,setEvent_date]=useState("");const[event_type,setEvent_type]=useState("");const[guests,setGuests]=useState("");const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[success,setSuccess]=useState("");const[error,setError]=useState("");const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setLoading(true);setError("");setSuccess("");try{const payload={name,email,phone,event_date,event_type,guests:Number(guests)||0,message:`${event_type} booking request for ${guests} guest(s).`};const response=await axios.post(EVENT_BOOKING_API,payload);setLoading(false);setSuccess(response.data.message||"Event request sent successfully.");// reset fields
setName("");setEmail("");setPhone("");setEvent_date("");setEvent_type("");setGuests("");}catch(err){var _err$response,_err$response$data;setLoading(false);setError(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:(_err$response$data=_err$response.data)===null||_err$response$data===void 0?void 0:_err$response$data.message)||"Failed to send booking request");console.error(err);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"name",placeholder:"Name",value:name,onChange:e=>setName(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"email",placeholder:"Email",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"phone",placeholder:"Phone",value:phone,onChange:e=>setPhone(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"date",name:"event_date",value:event_date,onChange:e=>setEvent_date(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"event_type",placeholder:"Event Type",value:event_type,onChange:e=>setEvent_type(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",name:"guests",placeholder:"Guests",value:guests,onChange:e=>setGuests(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:loading?"Sending...":"Send Event Request"}),success&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:"green"},children:success}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:"red"},children:error})]});};export default EventBooking;
